cases.name: normal
cases.description: Baseline four-drone swarm with full support roles enabled.

cases.name: relay_fail
cases.description: Relay fails and support is not allowed to compensate.

cases.name: relay_fail_with_support
cases.description: Relay fails and support is allowed to bridge/take over.

cases.name: scout_fail
cases.description: Scout sensing fails and support is not allowed to compensate.

cases.name: scout_fail_with_support
cases.description: Scout sensing fails and support is allowed to move forward and provide backup scanning.

cases.name: scout_fail_with_full_support
cases.description: Scout sensing fails and support is allowed to scan, bridge, and move forward as a redundant node.
